chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, MIRPURKHAS C.P.No.S-200 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 29.10.2025 Mr. Mehfooz Ali Laghari, advocate for petitioner along with petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Shareef Solangi AAG. Mr. Neel Parkash DPG. = Petitioner seeks protection of the law as they allege harassment against the official respondents at the instance of private respondents. Pursuant to notices, reply filed by the official respondents No.2 and 3 wherein they have stated that they have not caused any harassment to the petitioner nor they intended to-do-so in future. Learned A.A.G and Learned D.P.G present in Court undertake on behalf of official respondents that they shall act strictly in accordance with law and provide legal protection to the petitioner. Learned counsel for petitioner being satisfied on the undertaking of learned A.A.G and D.P.G seeks disposal of instant petition. Ordered accordingly. JUDGE Ahmed/Pa,
